name: Beast Staff (Major)
description:
The visages of beasts are carved into the painted wood of a beast staff, with a large head on top. When used as a weapon, the staff is a +2 greater striking staff. While wielding the staff while you have it prepared, you're affected by . If you have , you gain a +2 circumstance bonus on checks using it.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
